name: Universe Ring
description: The Universe Ring (乾坤圈, Qiánkūn Quān), also known as the Cosmic Ring, is a powerful and iconic artifact in Chinese mythology, most famously wielded by the child deity Nezha. This golden ring, often depicted as a bangle-like weapon, possesses incredible cosmic power, capable of manipulating the very fabric of space and time. Its origins are shrouded in mystery, with some accounts claiming it was forged by the celestial blacksmiths of the heavens, imbued with the essence of creation itself. Others suggest it was a gift bestowed upon Nezha by his immortal master, Taiyi Zhenren, a Taoist immortal of Kunlun Mountain. The ring's powers extend beyond mere physical destruction; it can control the elements, manipulate gravity, create dimensional rifts, and even serve as a protective barrier against malevolent forces. The Universe Ring is not simply a weapon; it's a symbol of cosmic balance and the power to shape reality. Its circular form represents the cyclical nature of the universe, and its golden hue signifies purity and divine energy. Its significance lies in its ability to overcome seemingly insurmountable odds, reflecting the potential for even the smallest being to wield immense power when guided by righteousness. The ring is often depicted as being able to grow and shrink at will, demonstrating its adaptable nature and boundless potential. Its existence serves as a reminder of the interconnectedness of all things and the importance of maintaining harmony within the cosmos. It is a treasure of immense power, a symbol of hope, and a testament to the boundless potential of the divine. It is said that the ring resonates with the wearer's spirit, amplifying their inner strength and amplifying their connection to the universe itself. The Universe Ring is more than just an artifact; it's a key to unlocking the secrets of creation and a beacon of light in the face of darkness.
subtitle: Cosmic Power in a Golden Ring
origin: Forged by Celestial Blacksmiths or Gifted by Taiyi Zhenren
currentLocation: Unknown, possibly hidden in a celestial realm

keyMyths.title: Nezha's Birth and Mastery
keyMyths.description: Nezha's birth was extraordinary, and he quickly mastered the Universe Ring under the guidance of Taiyi Zhenren. He used it to defeat many demons and protect the innocent.

keyMyths.title: Defeating the Dragon King's Son
keyMyths.description: Nezha famously used the Universe Ring to defeat the Dragon King's son, Ao Bing, after he terrorized the local villagers. This act showcased the ring's immense power and Nezha's bravery.

sources.author: Xu Zhonglin
sources.description: A major source for Nezha's mythology, detailing the Universe Ring's powers.
sources.text: A major source for Nezha's mythology, detailing the Universe Ring's powers.

sources.author: Various
